title: Funny Moments at the Oscars Awards Show
summary: The Oscars is a big awards show for movies in Hollywood. At the 98th Academy Awards, there were many exciting moments. Timothée Chalamet, an actor, lost the best actor award to Michael B Jordan. Host Conan O'Brien made jokes about Chalamet, saying he upset ballet and opera fans. Chalamet smiled with his girlfriend Kylie Jenner. O'Brien later said they were just having fun. The show had tight security because of world events. Backstage, winners celebrated with their Oscars, and there was a tie in one category. This article shares what happened behind the scenes that TV viewers didn't see.

keywords.explanation: a big awards show for movies
an actor who was joked about
when two people win the same award

background_read: The Oscars, or Academy Awards, is an annual event where movies and actors are honored with awards. It's held in Hollywood, California, and is watched by millions on TV. The show includes speeches, performances, and funny moments. Security is important to protect everyone attending. This article talks about the 98th Oscars, highlighting jokes and behind-the-scenes activities.
Article_Structure: WHO: Timothée Chalamet, Conan O'Brien, and other attendees at the Oscars.
WHAT: Jokes about Chalamet, tight security, and backstage celebrations.
WHERE: At the Dolby Theatre in Hollywood, California.
WHY: To share funny and unseen moments from the Oscars awards show.

perspectives.description: Focuses on the humorous and celebratory aspects of the Oscars.
